name: Orange Blossom Cake with Orange Frosting
recipeIngredient: 6 Egg whites; beaten until stiff peaks form
recipeInstructions:
Cream butter and sugar together well. Add flour, baking powder, and salt alternately with milk. Stir in vanilla and orange flavoring. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites until combined. Divide batter equally among three 9-inch layer cake pans that have been greased and floured. Bake at 375°F for about 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow to cool on wire racks for at least 20 minutes before turning cakes upright.
To assemble:
1. Place the bottom layer of the cooled cake onto a serving plate.
2. Spread a thin layer of orange marmalade over the surface.
3. Invert the second layer upside down and place it on top of the first layer, spreading more marmalade over the sides.
4. Invert the third layer on top and spread the remaining marmalade and frosting evenly over the cake.
Orange Frosting:
1. Combine sugar, cream of tartar, salt, egg whites, and cold water in a large heatproof bowl.
2. Place the bowl over a saucepan of simmering water, making sure the bowl does not touch the water.
3. Beat with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Remove from the hot water and beat in orange flavoring and vanilla extract for a few more minutes to blend and firm up the frosting.
